name: TruClaw
description: Security guardrail plugin for OpenClaw. Intercepts sensitive tool calls and requires out-of-band human approval via a paired iPhone. Requires a relay service and an Anthropic API key for risk classification.
author: Sanjay Krishnamurthy

TRUKYC_RELAY_URL.label: Relay URL
TRUKYC_RELAY_URL.help: Relay endpoint used for device pairing and approval delivery. Defaults to a managed relay if not self-hosted.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_TRUKYC.label: Anthropic API Key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_TRUKYC.help: Used only to classify tool calls as safe or dangerous. Tool metadata (not biometric data) is sent for classification.

TRUKYC_RELAY_URL.description: Relay endpoint used for pairing and approval delivery

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_TRUKYC.description: Anthropic API key used for tool-call risk classification
